articles.title: Social media companies to get time to build audit
articles.description: The government may give social media platforms time to prepare technically before enforcing the new information technology regulations that require them to detect and label artificial intelligence (AI)-generated content submitted by users, officials told ET. In effect, these platforms will have to incorporate audit-ready technical measures to comply with the new norms, they said.
articles.content:
Synopsis
The government may give social media platforms time to prepare technically before enforcing the new information technology regulations that require them to detect and label artificial intelligence (AI)-generated content submitted by users, o... [3420 chars]

articles.content: It has been raining educational institutions on me. Last fortnight, I was at the Sri Kanyaka Parameswari College and last week, I was at the Indian Institute of Technology Madras (IIT M). The latter had invited me to the 20th-year celebrations of the... [1165 chars]

articles.title: NAPLAN testing for more than 1.3 million Australian students paused due to technical issues
articles.description: NAPLAN testing for more than 1.3 million Australian students has been paused following technology problems with the online assessment.
articles.content:
NAPLAN testing for more than 1.3 million Australian students has been paused following technology problems with the online assessment.
The annual assessment of students in years 3, 5, 7 and 9 tests for basic literacy and numeracy.
Tests were to start... [666 chars]

articles.title: Trump Issues Ultimatum To Tehran, Says Remove Sea Mines Or Face 'Never Seen Before' Retaliation
articles.description: Trump warned of severe military consequences and the use of specialised strike technology to eliminate any Iranian vessels attempting to mine the Strait of Hormuz.
articles.content:
Washington: US President Donald Trump on Tuesday (local time) issued a sharply worded statement against Iran, calling on the country to refrain from placing mines in the Strait of Hormuz and warning of military consequences if they are not removed.
H... [2127 chars]
